hooks.command: bash -c 'BASE="$HOME/Desktop/nova-pipeline/memory"; FLAG="$BASE/.loaded_${PPID}"; [ -f "$FLAG" ] && exit 0; touch "$FLAG"; echo "=== [현재 상태] ==="; cat "$BASE/L1_state.md" 2>/dev/null; echo "==="; exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qi "\.env" && echo "BLOCKED: .env 읽기 금지" >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0'
bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o "command.*" | head -1); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|force.?push.*main)"; then echo "위험한 명령 차단" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o "file_path[^,}]*" | grep -o "/[^\"]*"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.js ]] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✅ 문법 OK" || echo "❌ 문법 오류 확인 필요"; fi; exit 0'
